entry.title: Desktop shortcut of CS02 with inserted BOM number
entry.content:
Hello,

for direct open CS02 transaction is created shortcut and this is working (screenshot of shortcut attached).

How to create shortcut for not only open CS02 transaction, but fulfil and open one more screen - example of request for full shortcut functionality from win desktop shortcut:

1. Open transaction CS02
2. Insert follow data:

Material: 980640645
Plant: empty field
BOM usage: 3
Alternative BOM: empty field

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn,
We apologise for the spam posts in the community, but as you have noticed we have been under a spam attack. We have the attack under control now, and are working as fast as we can to remove the spam content.

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
Good suggestion.

Should be implemented.

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to d...

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I'm pretty sure that is not the last such an attack. Would you consider my proposal? It's simple yet efficient.

entry.title: Warning Message for nearby expiry material while creating Sales Order
entry.content:
Greetings Everyone,

Client requirement is the implementation of a warning message in the system. 

This message would alert users when creating sale orders for materials approaching a 9-month expiry period.

Please let me know and thanks in advance!

SAP ERP

entry.title: How to consume BPA destination in the Fiori template in BAS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Build Process and after deployment i created a BPA destination using all the necessary additional properties in BTP Cockpit .

When UI guy is trying to add service this destination is not appearing in the list . Just want to understand is it possible to directly consume BPA instance in BAS or not? If yes then please guide on this.

Kindly share your inputs.

Thanks!

entry.title: Conditionally output of text field in adobe forms
entry.content:
Creating a form in SFP, I do not find where I can prevent the output of a text field if it is empty. I do not want the field to occupy space in the floating area when it is empty.

I tried to set a condition on the field in the context, but in the output I see that it still occupies space on the page. This makes the output look ugly.

What I am looking for is a similar thing to an "alternative" in SmartForms, where I can omit parts of the layout depending on certain values in the parameters. Can anybody help?

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
We have observed that in the legacy learning home page the newly created items are visible immediately. Where as in the new learning home page we created an item and it is still not visible even after a week of it's creation. This is a very big drawback and is one of the reasons why users are very hesitant to move to the new learning home page.

Why is there a delay could somebody explain?

I am playing the role of CTO/CIO in an Indian Rea-estate (aka Developer) company, implementing SAP S/4 HANA on Rise.

Last several years, have been accountable for SAP in similar companies.

regards

Gupta

entry.title: Budget Availability Control for Cost Centers: Revenue Accounts Do Not Increase Available Budget
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
I am experiencing an issue with the budget availability control for cost centers in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2 SL) and hope you can help identify the cause. Specifically, revenue accounts do not seem to correctly increase the available budget. The behavior is peculiar: While the increased budget from revenue is visible in the cost center budget report, it cannot be utilized for expenditures, such as in a purchase order.
 
To my understanding, the help page implies this functionality:

 

Below you will find my settings and tests in detail (apologies for the length):

1. My Budget Control Profile „NOUSE" :

My profile is using the G/L Account Hierarchy "KST-BDGT" at the root node, ensuring that everything is included. Below is an excerpt:

The following G/L accounts will be used for budget transactions:
  • G/L Account 61003000 (red): Used to create a purchase order to reduce the budget.
  • G/L Accounts 41001000 (green) & 54083000 (orange): Used to calculte the increased budget with a sales order & invoice.

2. My newly created cost center "850-DEMO" (with no previous postings & budget profile active)

3. Adding €100,000 to the cost center "850-DEMO" (as a budget supplement) :

4. Checking that the 100.000€ are availabe on „850-DEMO“ in the cost center budget report:

 Everything looks good so far.

5. Create a Purchase Order with cost center "850-DEMO"

A purchase order with a value of €100,000 can be created (Warning at €100,000; Error at €100,000.01).

6. Checking the budget consumption:

The budget is now €0, as expected.

7. Now, I will create revenue with a sales order and invoice for cost center "850-DEMO."

 

You can see that €23,456 was created, minus internal price of €5,111.29  resulting in a profit margin of €18,344.71

This is perfectly shown as available budget on the cost center budget report:

So, you would assume that €18,344.71 is available again for spending. But strangely, this is not the case.

 8. Attempting to spend the new budget on a new purchase order:

Error: No budget available. Not even €1 can be spent

 

I don't understand why this is happening. Maybe you can help.

 

Thanks in advance,
 
Simon

entry.title: Re: ABAP Memory Concept in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you can move all entries from one internal table to another one using MOVE-CORRESPONDING statement.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_752_index_htm/7.52/en-US/abapmove-corresponding.htm

You should not use the memory buffer, this is old technology from the old report, function module based development approach. But rather hand over the information either through the method signature (as import parameter) or during the creation of the object instantiation (saved on a member variable - in this case internal table).

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Integrating Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content: St dry asf g hyper family family family family family

entry.title: Re: Use of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CHANGE to change a value in RBKP table
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi I have used that but it the payment block remains the same.

entry.title: Re: Let's not REDUCE the readability of the code
entry.content:
I see I come late to the discussion by 3 years, though I'd like to leave comment because I was looking for some information regarding the use of REDUCE. 

To be honest, it feels awkward for me, as it adds confusion to the code where it's used.

Let's start with the name REDUCE: When you open SAP documentation for REDUCE, they actually explain why REDUCE was choosen for the operation in the Notes section. From Clean Code perspective, a name has to be self-explaining, so the issue actually starts with the operation's name. Now people start to add comments on their REDUCE statements, but we don't want to express ourselves in comments, we want to express ourselves in code.  Clean code is not about having the less possible lines of code, it's about to make it easier to understand what the program does. Additionally, this kind of operation looks and feels pretty much like a script language, not OO, and it temps developers to combine operations and conditions into one line, not to mention the threat of creating functions with polyadic arguments, because someone wants to have everything compressed into one call.

So I'd choose a simple LOOP AT or WHILE over those kind of expressions.

entry.title: Re: Enhance Mash-up screen for custom fields
entry.content:
Hi @RashiChowdhary1, thanks its a detail document for mashup. 

Do you have any step by step guide. I am in client we need to use mashup for payroll custom infotype in SF EC.

entry.title: S/4 HANAオンプレミス版（TDD版）の環境構築に関する質問
entry.content:
【質問】
現在、社内向けにS/4 HANAのオンプレミス環境（TDD版）を構築したいと考えておりますが、
構築の手順が分からずに困っています。
構築の手順については何を参照するのが良いでしょうか？
手順の詳細について書かれているWebサイトやドキュメントなどがあれば、ご教示いただきたいと考えております。
参考になる動画やWebセミナー等のご紹介などでも大変ありがたいです。

【背景】
今年新しくSAPのパートナーになったばかりで、まだ分からないことも多い状況なのですが、
上記をSAP社のサポート側にも質問しても明確な回答がもらえずに、困っている状況です。

現在は以下まで進めている状況です。

◆端末準備
要件については各種Webサイトを見て調べて、以下のスペックの実機を調達中です。
＜スペック＞
CPU：Core i7 9700(最大4.7GHz)第9世代
メモリ：128GB(DDR4)
ストレージ：NVMe PCIe SSD1TB
増設ディスク（SSD２TB＋HDD４TB）

OSは元々組み込まれているものではなく、SUSE Linux Enterprise Serverをセットアップする予定です。

＊以下のWebサイトを参考に要件を調べました。
SAP S/4HANA Implement Guides
SAP Note 2235581
SAP Product Availability Matrix


◆ライセンス取得状況
・オンプレミスのTDDのライセンスはオーダー完了済み
・SAP for Meのソフトウェアダウンロードセンタまでアクセスしたものの、どれをダウンロードすべきかが分からない状況

上記ソフトウェアダウンロードセンタからインストールできるものの他で
インストールが必要な各種ソフトウェアなどついてもよくわかっていない状況です。
大変恐縮ですが、どなたかご回答をいただけますと大変助かります。

entry.title: INDUS Annual Meet - Mumbai - Nov 14'24
entry.content:
It is the time of the year when we invite the entire SAP community in India to come together on a single platform to learn from each other and celebrate the success of the teams that have delivered significant projects for their business.

INDUS Annual Conference 2024
Date: 14th November 2024
Location : The Westin Powai Lake, Mumbai.

You can find the agenda and all other information about the conference at the event site - https://lnkd.in/gc5waSfB

The conference registration is as follows:

INR 1000 for SAP customers
INR 5000 for SAP partner

Wait, there is an early bird discount of 25% for all members who register before 25th October 2024.

 

 

Linkedin Post on INDUS Annual Meet 2024

INDUS Annual Meet - Mumbai - Nov 14'24 - SAP Community

entry.content:

I'm receiving a message that says "undefined process completed successfully" in a custom POD in SAP DM.

This message primarily appears after a "Design Production Process - Cloud Process" is completed, which is triggered by an action button in the POD.

Can anyone explain why this happens and how we can prevent the message?

 

 

Thanks

SAP Digital Manufacturing@ManoelCosta

entry.title: Removing payment block in SE16 in RBKP table?
entry.content:
I was trying to release the block of an invoice document. However, I have encountered an issue wherein the payment block in RBKP in SE16 is still present after successfully releasing the invoice.

I've used BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_RELEASE for releasing the invoice and BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CHANGE to remove the payment block value in RBKP table.

The flow is this:

Call BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_RELEASE to release the payment block of the invoice. After that, BAPI_INCOMING_CHANGE will be called.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_RELEASE'
  EXPORTING
    invoicedocnumber = ls_blocked_inv-belnr
    fiscalyear       = ls_blocked_inv-gjahr
  TABLES
    return           = it_return.

lx_header-INV_DOC_NO = ls_blocked_inv-belnr.
lx_header-INV_YEAR   = ls_blocked_inv-gjahr.
lx_header-pmnt_block = ' '.
lx_headerX-PMNT_BLOCK = ' '.(Here I've tried to use X and R but no success)

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    invoicedocnumber = ls_blocked_inv-belnr
    fiscalyear       = ls_blocked_inv-gjahr
    headerdata_change = lx_header
    headerdata-changex = lx_headerx
  TABLES
    return = it_return.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'

entry.title: Auto assigning process roles to workflow tasks
entry.content:
We have the following Problem: We want to map our glossary entries, using JavaScript via JavaScript elements in Signavio Process Governance. To be more specific, we want to map our entries about employee information (name and position) to automatically assign to Tasks in our approval workflow process, to speed up said process.

Explaination of our glossary entries and links:
The employee information is set using the respective selection field, wich is linked to the glossary entry of that position. This entry is selected in a process diagram as an attribute.

For example:
John Smith is our employee. He has a glossary entry, wich documents his name, position and all the processes he's in. In a workflow, he is selected through his position i.e. the system searches for the responsible Business Process Owner of process 11 and it finds John Smith linked in the entry of "11 Business Process Owner". This sets a link to John Smith's employee entry to the glossary entry of "Business Process Owner". Furthermore, this link is set as an attribute in every process John Smith is responsible for. Again the example of process 11. John Smith is set as "11 Business Process Owner".


Tldr:
We want to auto assign tasks to responsible Business Process Owners (or other employees in different positions), to skip the manual assignment in each approval workflow, using JavaScript.

https://learninghub.sap.com/

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Frequently Asked Questions on the set up of SAP SuccessFactors App in Microsoft Teams
entry.content:
Before going on, please check if there is an already available KBA under category "Collaboration and Work Tech LOD-SF-EAS-WRK " that can help answer your concern. A few examples include:

  • Unable to activate Extended Integration with Microsoft 365 https://me.sap.com/notes/3355751/E
  • Unable to add additional User identifiers in Work Tech Configuration https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3437595
  • SAP SuccessFactors app for MS Teams error - You're currently unconnected  https://me.sap.com/notes/3524988/E 
  • "User mapping check failed" error in Work Tech Configuration Page https://me.sap.com/notes/3371538/E
  •  Service connection error when trying to use SuccessFactors app in Microsoft Teams https://me.sap.com/notes/3512164/E

If you do not find the answers, please read on or post a comment in this blog.

 

Q: Users are getting an error in the Teams App " The app is unavailable due to user mapping issues. Please contact your administrator for help", what does this mean?

A:The error only shows up under Application type permission. The user in Teams is not uniquely mapped correctly to a user in SuccessFactors, e.g:

  • the same email/ID is found for two users in SuccessFactors
  • the same email/ID cannot identify any users in SuccessFactors
  • the end user must have the permissions (this is documented here) 
    • Users have the User Permissions > General User Permission > User Search permission and are included in the target population. The Exclude granted users from having the same access to themselves option must not be selected. The defaultLocale field must be configured in the user API.
    • Users must not have the Administrator Permissions > Manage User > Employee Export permission. If users have this permission, they must be included in the target population, and the Exclude granted users from having the same access to themselves option must not be selected.

This message will be enhanced in 2025 to reflect possible reasons for failure.

 

Q: Users are getting an error in the Teams App "Unable to reach app", what does this mean?

A: This is intended to be a generic message as the root cause cannot be differentiated and reflected in the message without troubleshooting, we display this generic message in the hopes of the user trying to access the app again, or asking for admins for help and eventually submit a Support ticket for engineers to take a closer look

 

Q: Users see error in the Teams App: "Service connection between SAP SuccessFactors and Microsoft 365 hasn't been established". What does this mean?

A:  The user has downloaded the App prematurely, before the SuccessFactors Admin or Teams Admin has set up connection in the Work Tech Configuration Page. There are likely missing steps in the Work Tech or Azure configuration, such as user mapping or permissions.

 

Q: Can I connect one SuccessFactors instance to multiple Teams tenants? What about the other way around?  And what happens if I did set up the connection from multiple SF linking to the same Teams Tenant in the Admin Centre?

A: As of 1H 2025, we will support one SuccessFactors instance connecting to multiple Teams tenants. But not the other way around (i.e one Teams connecting to multiple SuccessFactors instances). If you did set up the connection from multiple SF linking to the same Teams Tenant in the Admin Centre, the Teams App won't work properly. At any given time, the request from Teams app will be sent to a connected instance randomly.

 

Q: What aspect of the App appearance can be customized?

The App's name and icon can be customized through Teams Admin Centre. Please see the Microsoft documentation on how to customize those.

Description customization will come end of 2024.

entry.title: Re: T-codes used for clearing GL accounts.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

if the G/L accounts have no open items, what do you want to clear there?

 

A similar question raised with a lot background information is this one: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/gl-account-clearing-using-t-code-f-03/qaq-p/6179713#:~:text=code%20F%2D03,-Former%20Member

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Conditionally output of text field in adobe forms
entry.content: In design, you need to turn off the element via scripting AND pay attention to its parent subform, since only flowed containers will effectively reuse the (now empty) space.

entry.title: Re: formatter function not found
entry.content:
Please correct the import of ValueState like this:

sap.ui.define([
	"sap/ui/core/ValueState"
], function (ValueState) {
	"use strict";

	return {

		/**
		 * Rounds the number unit value to 2 digits
		 * @public
		 *  {string} sValue the number string to be rounded
		 * @returns {string} sValue with 2 digits rounded
		 */
		numberUnit: function (sValue) {
			if (!sValue) {
				return "";
			}
			return parseFloat(sValue).toFixed(2);
		},

		/**
		 * Defines a value state based on the stock level
		 *
		 * @public
		 *  {number} iValue the stock level of a product
		 * @returns {string} sValue the state for the stock level
		 */
		quantityState: function(iValue) {
			if (iValue === 0) {
				return ValueState.Error;
			} else if (iValue <= 10) {
				return ValueState.Warning;
			} else {
				return ValueState.Success;
			}
		}

	};

});

Also check the documentation to implement custom formatter:
https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/0f8626ed7b7542ffaa44601828db20de?q=formatter

entry.title: Introducing Our New Event-Based Revenue Recognition FAQ Page
entry.content:
Asking questions is a fundamental part of learning and understanding. When it comes to complex topics like Event-Based Revenue Recognition, having a platform to ask questions and find answers is crucial. That's why we're excited to announce the launch of a new FAQ page on the SAP Help Portal, dedicated to gathering and addressing questions related to Event-Based Revenue Recognition.

The FAQ page on the SAP Help Portal is specifically dedicated to Event-Based Revenue Recognition and gathers all your questions in one place, making it easier for you to find the answers you need. Whether you’re new to Event-Based Revenue Recognition or an experienced user looking for specific details, our FAQ page has got you covered. 

So, without further ado, we encourage you to take a look at our Event-Based Revenue Recognition FAQ page here:  

FAQs for Event-Based Revenue Recognition

FAQs for Event-Based Revenue Recognition for Projects

We’re also keen to hear from you. Do you have burning questions about Event-Based Revenue Recognition that you’d like to see addressed in our FAQ? Share your thoughts and questions in the comments below, and we’ll do our best to incorporate them into our FAQ page. After all, the FAQ is not just a resource for information, but also an opportunity for participation and collaboration. 

Stay tuned for more updates and additions to our FAQ page, as we continue to expand and enhance our resources to better support you in your journey with Event-Based Revenue Recognition in SAP.

Use of Annotation 'Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled' is not permitted (not released)

entry.title: Issue working whit batch request on Purchase Order SAP API whit SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi team,

My goal is to create purchase orders in bulk via the Purchase Order API (OData V4), but I’m having trouble understanding the exact structure of the XML payload I need to send. After researching, I believe the correct structure is this:

<batchParts>
    <batchChangeSet1>
        <batchChangeSetPart1>
            <method>POST</method>
            <uri>PurchaseOrder</uri>
            <body>
                <PurchaseOrder>
                    <PurchaseOrder_Type>
                        <PurchaseOrderType>NB</PurchaseOrderType>
                        <PurchaseOrderDate>2024-09-23</PurchaseOrderDate>
                        <CompanyCode>3501</CompanyCode>
                        <PurchasingOrganization>3501</PurchasingOrganization>
                        <PurchasingGroup>001</PurchasingGroup>
                        <Supplier>1000000</Supplier>
                        <DocumentCurrency>EUR</DocumentCurrency>
                        <VATRegistrationCountry>PT</VATRegistrationCountry>
                        <_PurchaseOrderItem>
                            <PurchaseOrderItem_Type>
                                <Material>30</Material>
                                <Plant>3517</Plant>
                                <StorageLocation>351B</StorageLocation>
                                <OrderQuantity>10</OrderQuantity>
                                <PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit>PC</PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit>
                                <NetPriceAmount>3</NetPriceAmount>
                                <DocumentCurrency>EUR</DocumentCurrency>
                                <TaxCode>02</TaxCode>
                                <_PurchaseOrderScheduleLineTP>
                                    <PurchaseOrderScheduleLine_Type>
                                        <ScheduleLineDeliveryDate>2024-10-01</ScheduleLineDeliveryDate>
                                    </PurchaseOrderScheduleLine_Type>
                                </_PurchaseOrderScheduleLineTP>
                            </PurchaseOrderItem_Type>
                        </_PurchaseOrderItem>
                    </PurchaseOrder_Type>
                </PurchaseOrder>
            </body>
        </batchChangeSetPart1>
    </batchChangeSet1>
    <batchChangeSet1>
        <batchChangeSetPart1>
            <method>POST</method>
            <uri>PurchaseOrder</uri>
            <body>
                <PurchaseOrder>
                    <PurchaseOrder_Type>
                        <PurchaseOrderType>NB</PurchaseOrderType>
                        <PurchaseOrderDate>2024-09-23</PurchaseOrderDate>
                        <CompanyCode>3501</CompanyCode>
                        <PurchasingOrganization>3501</PurchasingOrganization>
                        <PurchasingGroup>001</PurchasingGroup>
                        <Supplier>1000000</Supplier>
                        <DocumentCurrency>EUR</DocumentCurrency>
                        <VATRegistrationCountry>PT</VATRegistrationCountry>
                        <_PurchaseOrderItem>
                            <PurchaseOrderItem_Type>
                                <Material>30</Material>
                                <Plant>3517</Plant>
                                <StorageLocation>351B</StorageLocation>
                                <OrderQuantity>10</OrderQuantity>
                                <PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit>PC</PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit>
                                <NetPriceAmount>3</NetPriceAmount>
                                <DocumentCurrency>EUR</DocumentCurrency>
                                <TaxCode>02</TaxCode>
                                <_PurchaseOrderScheduleLineTP>
                                    <PurchaseOrderScheduleLine_Type>
                                        <ScheduleLineDeliveryDate>2024-10-01</ScheduleLineDeliveryDate>
                                    </PurchaseOrderScheduleLine_Type>
                                </_PurchaseOrderScheduleLineTP>
                            </PurchaseOrderItem_Type>
                        </_PurchaseOrderItem>
                    </PurchaseOrder_Type>
                </PurchaseOrder>
            </body>
        </batchChangeSetPart1>
    </batchChangeSet1>
</batchParts>

However, I always receive an error stating that the payload is malformed. Is this true? What would be the correct structure, and where could I have found it? The biggest issue I’m encountering is the lack of information on this topic. Note that the body part works when I post one PO individualy.

On the other hand, when creating the XSD using the OData adapter, the sublevels '_PurchaseOrderItem' or '_PurchaseOrderScheduleLineTP' are never generated, even when I force the maximum number of sublevels. Could this be the problem?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Get information from Report S_ALR_87012078 vía API
entry.content:
Hello all,

I know that there is a standard report S_ALR_87012078 for open item vendor wise and the due date of payment to the Vendor.

Is there a way to access to this information via standard API? Which one is it? 

If not, there is a way to publish this report as an API?

Regards.

Antono Sanz.

entry.title: Re: End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Dear Monika,

Please ignore my issue, I deleted the participant ID and re-configured then the incoming documents generated. Thank you.

 

Best Regards

Jenny

entry.title: Re: EDOC_ADAPTOR_CLOUD BADI Implementation for XML data modification in SET_OUTPUT_METHOD
entry.content:
Hi Sunil Kumar.

You can try the following steps in S4HC Public/Private Edition. 

1 Open ADT with backend to your launchpad. Press Ctrl+Shift+A and search for ES_EDOCUMENT_CLOUD Enchantment Spot.

2 You need here EDOC_ADAPTOR_CLOUD Badi there. Add new BAdI implementation. 

3 You also need implementation class. Create and activate it. 

4 Open implementation class. You see bunch of methods for redefinition. 

Method if_edoc_adaptor_cloud~change_edocument_type allows you to change Electronic Document Type. 

Method if_edoc_adaptor_cloud~is_relevant allows to define if current Billing Document relevant for creation respective Electronic Document for it. 

Method if_edoc_adaptor_cloud~set_output_data allows to update values of XML document before printing/sending it. 

5  Lets debug it and see what fields if_edoc_adaptor_cloud~set_output_data allows to change. I have created EDoc for Invoice 

Set up a breakpoint in if_edoc_adaptor_cloud~set_output_data and Submit Edoc you will catch the debugger where you can see what fields you can replace. 

 

I think this is a good starting point for your investigation. 

 

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Re: How do we create a variable on WEBI that calculates i...
entry.content:
@SAR_22so, If I follow your data, you have a table organised like that :

Customer key | MRN - organization (Lab ?) | Performed Date/time | Status of the operation performed | other data and probably an "operation key"

  • 1 line = 1 analyse performed by customer in a lab
  • You could have n ligne for 1 customer.

So first, you need to know the order of each performed analyse with Rank(measure;[ranking_dims][;Top|Bottom][;reset_dims]) and put it in an object like OrderRanked

This rank give you a list from the first analyse to the last.
With number(operation key) in (customer key) you cound know how many performed analyse you have by customer.

With the [Performed Date/time] where(OrderRanked="1") you obtain the first date of your list.
After that, for each line you could calculate with datebetween() the first date and the date in the line.

You could also mark your customer whose answer your parameters (you stop the calcul when you find what you want)

entry.title: Where can I gain insight how SAP Analytics Cloud can be used for sports clubs?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Answering Frequently Asked Questions for SAP Analytics Cloud for the Sports Industry learning journey


Overview
Sports clubs around the world are under tremendous pressure to succeed. With SAP Sports One, sports clubs can optimize their operations in training management, scouting, performance diagnostics, match analysis, and many other areas. Additionally, sports clubs are also implementing SAP Analytics Cloud. The analytics tool allows sports clubs to analyze and present their collected data in the best possible way. Through this, the club can gain important insights to drive sustainable growth.

Learning objectives
After completing this course, you will learn how to apply SAP Analytics Cloud functionalities at a beginner level. Additionally, upon completing, you will also learn how to apply SAP Analytics Cloud functionalities at an intermediate and advanced level.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud for Sport Industry

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Exception: No associated client ID found with the given ANID
entry.content:
I am trying to access the Ariba Network Purchase Orders Supplier API. I have created an application and registered it for the API, requested and received approval and generated client secret. With client ID and secret, I can retrieve an OAuth2 token. When I request Ghttps://openapi.ariba.com/api/purchase-orders-supplier/v1/prod/orders with the token in Authorization header, the API key in apikey header and the ANID of my organization in the X-ARIBA-NETWORK-ID header, I am receiving the following error message (status 401):

HTTP Status: 401
Exception: No associated client ID found with the given ANID

How can I associate my client ID with the ANID?

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Thomas

Can you let me know if you have any experience with the second part?

Thank you in advance.

Patrick

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,

Sergi

entry.title: Re: Conditionally output of text field in adobe forms
entry.content:
Docu: https://help.adobe.com/en_US/livecycle/10.0/DesignerScriptingBasics/index.html

Reference: https://help.adobe.com/en_US/livecycle/10.0/DesignerScriptingRef/index.html

For example:

if ($.rawValue == null) then
SF_LABEL.presence = "invisible"
endif

entry.title: SAP DC, Connectivity options and details
entry.content:
Hi,

  we are going to need 2 connections for SAP RISE with SAP datacenter (base option). The customer wants to use mpls as primary connectivity option and VPN as backup one (both wired and radiofrequency). Our communications teams has launched these questions, could you help us with them:

For the case of MPLS, what connectivity options would be available? Do you offer any service to connect to the environment, like Fabric or something similar? Is it possible to connect through the Data Center’s MMR ? Is it necessary to install a CPE, or can we connect to a provider's device?

For base option in europe , only Rot Germany is available ? 

In the Communications Datasheet template for SAP DC, only the VPN option is listed in the tabs. how can we request an MPLS connection for base option ?

best regards

entry.title: Re: CL_SALV_TABLE number of rows
entry.content:
The function LINES exists since ABAP 6.10:

lv_count_displayed_entries = lines( gt_tr_list ) - lines( lt_filtered_entries ).

entry.title: What Certificate Type to Use for Custom Domains in the Neo Environment
entry.content:
By using the new add-domain-certificate console command, you can now add another type of certificate to the one you have for the SSL host. Before, you were able to bind only RSA certificates. However, now you can bind elliptic curve (ECC) certificates in addition to the RSA ones. See add-domain-certificate.

To adapt to the latest cryptography recommendations, you should use the ECC algorithm because it’s the most modern and secure cryptographic algorithm for server-side certificates.

 

 

Example: How to Set Up Your First ECC Certificate for the Custom Domain in the Neo Environment

1. Generate a certificate signing request (CSR):

neo generate-csr --account mysubaccount --user mymail@example.com --host hana.ondemand.com --name myECCcert --certificate-distinguished-name "C=BG,O=MyCompany,CN=www.mycompany.bg,E=admin@mycompany.bg" --elliptic-curve secp256r1

For more information, see generate-csr.

2. Send the CSR to a certificate authority (CA).

Copy and send the CSR to your trusted CA to sign the certificate.

3. Upload the SSL certificate you received from the CA:

neo upload-domain-certificate --account mysubaccount --user mymail@example.com --host hana.ondemand.com --name myECCcert --location ./certificate.pub

For more information, see upload-domain-certificate.

4. Bind the certificate:

neo bind-domain-certificate --account mysubaccount --user mymail@example.com --host hana.ondemand.com --ssl-host mysslhostname --certificate myECCcert

For more information, see bind-domain-certificate

 

Modern clients (browsers) support ECC. However, if you still have other clients that don’t support ECC, it’s possible to bind an additional uploaded RSA certificate next to the existing ECC one by using the add-domain-certificate console command. 

Example

neo add-domain-certificate --account mysubaccount --user mymail@example.com --host hana.ondemand.com --ssl-host mysslhostname --certificate myRSAcert

 

 

 

Furthermore, you can add an ECC certificate to an SSL host with a bound RSA certificate by using the add-domain-certificate console command.

Example

neo add-domain-certificate --account mysubaccount --user mymail@example.com --host hana.ondemand.com --ssl-host mysslhostname --certificate myECCcert

 

 

 

 

We’d appreciate your feedback on the usage of the ECC certificates.

entry.title: how to Dump files in AWS S3 from SAP business Process Automation
entry.content:
I am working on a solution where I need to upload files from SAP Build Process Automation (SAP BPA) to Amazon S3. I have already created a flow to download files from an SAP BPA screen flow, but I am facing issues connecting to S3. SAP BPA does not provide a native way to directly connect to S3, and I am unable to use Basic Authentication via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI). Is there a way to achieve this integration, or would another approach be necessary

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAP Business Workflow  SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood SAP Business Process Management SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to download HTTP Request Body (API) as an Excel file in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am building an integration flow which calls an Ariba API. In Postman, the API response is as shown in 2nd screenshot below. We then download the response as an .xlsx file, and it will be in a readable Excel file format.

In the Integration Flow, I am writing the API response to a data store, which returns the same thing as what we get on Postman. However, I need to download the response as an Excel file. How do I do that? Can that be configured directly in the HTTP connector step?

entry.title: Re: Why I love SAP and Blockchain Databases and why you should too 🚀
entry.content:
We are currently doing proving on the SAP BTP Kyma Service and 

there is  now a 14 Day Trial Public Blockchain running on SAP BTP Kyma here:

https://atkrypto-v1.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/

https://atkrypto-v2.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/

to save using Postman, there is a test cockpit as well

https://atkrypto-v1.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/cockpit.html

https://atkrypto-v2.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/cockpit.html

Have fun with your Blockchains on the SAP BTP Kyma 

Andy.

entry.title: Usage/Consumption of PRT
entry.content:
Dear All,                                                                                                                                                            The customer requires that PRT be utilized for a maximum of 5 production orders. After the 5th order, the shelf life of the PRT will expire, it should be consumed and replaced with a new PRT for the 6th production order.                                                                                                                                                                  Is it OKAY to use Equipment PRT in this case??  We have already created the Equipment PRT, along with a counter and a maintenance plan, and assigned it to the routing of the finished goods (FG) material.            After confirming the production order, report is generating(Tcode- IK17) for the quantity of equipment consumed.                                                                                                                                                However, how can we get the report on basis of PRT used in No. of production orders and its restriction beyond 5th production order.

Please help in these case, its quite urgent

 

Thanks,                                                                                                                                                                  Raj Tilak 

 

Thanks in advance

However, the values for the payment amount in local currency and local currency rate are zero from the data I get from the CDS view.

entry.title: Re: Problem with retrieving data from the S4 app through...
entry.content: Please, find the solution given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3531058

entry.title: CPI error "java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException" in Groovy Script
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have encountered the following error in a Groovy script. The error appears in several parts of the code:

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: 2 at line 82 in script1.groovy.
Code:
String test_type = TERST_PNR.substring(1, 2);
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: -2 at line 171 in script1.groovy.
Code:
if (xmlstr.substring(getXMLTag_startindex2 - 2, getXMLTag_startindex2 - 1).equals("/"))
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: -145 at line 195 in script1.groovy.
Code:
String tagtext = xmlstr.substring(getXMLTag_startindex2, getXMLTag_endindex1);
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: 3 at line 144 in script1.groovy.
Code:
"  <p1:SYSID>" + SNDPRN.substring(0, 3) + "</p1:SYSID>\r\n"

In each code section, the "substring" method is used. The error does not always occur. Three percent of all messages encounter this error.

Strangely enough, when I restart the messages in the ERP system, they are transmitted without errors. I have no chance to trace the message and reproduce the error

Has anyone experiences with this error? How can it be resolved? Is there a way to log the payload without enabling the trace?

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: My intro
entry.content: Welcome Faith

entry.title: Re: Usage/Consumption of PRT
entry.content:
Hello @RajTilak54 

That is implement with PRT counters - see SAP Help Maintenance Planning for Production Resources/Tools. They count how many times a PRT (tool) was used. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Deepak

entry.title: Find the logic behind standard fiori app
entry.content: How can I find the back end logic of a standard fiori app. I have a fiori app which is done with web dynpro at back end. I try to access the corresponding logic for various buttons. I tried it using the web dynpro component name to find the corresponding logic. But there were only some standard name under method tabs where I did not find anything. Can anyone please suggest some other way.
